content_addressed_records.notes: Content-addressed token arm uses digest prefix instead of a new identity system.

mature_ecc.notes: Reuse existing shortened BCH wrapper for 21-bit payloads; no new ECC code.

semantic_lookup.notes: Reuse exact packed MAP scan from Stage A.2a as the sidecar baseline.

trace_coactivation.notes: Only exact carried token closure is tested here; no recursive provenance or runtime orchestration.

transactional_commit.notes: Lifecycle states are simulated in a narrow harness only.

typed_exact_handles.notes: Plain typed field and sidecar are mandatory anti-NIH controls.

reuse.first_order_trace_coactivation: build_store_state, replay_operation, trace validation, duplicate/ambiguity dataset structure
reuse.lazy_trace_addressing_stage_a2a: packed exact semantic lookup and deterministic bit packing
reuse.level3_5b_native_noise_frontiers: mature BCH wrapper and frozen config family reuse

why_not_scratch: The repository already contains a deterministic replay bank, typed trace validation and packed exact MAP lookup.
A new metadata runtime, ANN stack or ECC implementation would expand scope without answering the equal-information capsule question.
This stage only needs a thin exact-token closure layer around existing first-order trace records.
